title: Memory is released only from first uncommited worksheet (Stream Write)
author: Wafel

comments.author: sudonate91
comments.body: Did you ever find a solution for this?

comments.author: Wafel
comments.body:
I have not fixed it directly, but I have implemented a workaround. 
I just create n workbooks and at the end of the process, I merge them into 1 final workbook. It's a little bit slower, but it is a fair tradeoff.
